title: Na'vi Vowels
objective: Learn the basic vowels used in the Na'vi language.

data.text: Na'vi is a phonetic language. Meaning a letter is pronounced the same way each time. The language has 33 sounds. This lesson will focus on the vowels first.
Na'vi has 7 vowels: a, ä, e, i, ì, o, u.

data.description: Pronounced like the 'a' in the English word 'father' or 'car'. Press the vowel to hear its pronunciation.
Pronounced like the 'a' in the English word 'cat' or 'pack'. Press the vowel to hear its pronunciation.
Pronounced like the 'e' in the English word 'then' or 'set'. Press the vowel to hear its pronunciation.
Pronounced like the 'i' in the English word 'machine'. It sounds similar to the English letter 'e'. Press the vowel to hear its pronunciation.
Pronounced like the 'i' in the English word 'bit' or 'thin'. Press the vowel to hear its pronunciation.
Pronounced like the 'o' in the English word 'own' or 'more'. Press the vowel to hear its pronunciation.
Pronounced like the 'u' in the English word 'dude'. Press the vowel to hear its pronunciation.

data.question: Which vowel appears in the 'Na'vi' language?
Which vowel sounds like the English letter e?
